fields.name: timestamp
fields.description: Timestamp of when the message was generated

fields.name: payload
fields.description: Main payload containing the lending decision override details

children.name: loanApplicationId
children.description: Unique identifier for the loan application

children.name: customerId
children.description: Unique identifier for the customer

children.name: originalDecision
children.description: Original lending decision made by the credit system

children.name: overrideDecision
children.description: Override lending decision made by the risk and compliance system

children.name: overrideReason
children.description: Reason for overriding the original lending decision

children.name: riskAssessmentDetails
children.description: Risk assessment details used to make the override decision

children.name: creditScore
children.description: Credit score of the customer

children.name: debtToIncomeRatio
children.description: Debt-to-income ratio of the customer

children.name: loanToValueRatio
children.description: Loan-to-value ratio of the loan application

children.name: yearsOfIncome
children.description: Number of years of income used in the risk assessment

children.name: mitigatingFactors
children.description: Mitigating factors considered during the risk assessment

children.name: overrideApprovalDetails
children.description: Details of the override approval process

children.name: approvedBy
children.description: Person or entity that approved the override

children.name: approvalLevel
children.description: Level of approval for the override

children.name: approvalDate
children.description: Date and time of approval for the override

children.name: conditions
children.description: Conditions attached to the override approval

children.name: loanDetails
children.description: Loan details used to make the lending decision override

children.name: loanAmount
children.description: Amount of the loan being applied for

children.name: currency
children.description: Currency of the loan amount

children.name: loanTerm
children.description: Length of the loan term in months

children.name: productType
children.description: Type of product being applied for (e.g. MORTGAGE)

children.name: complianceFlags
children.description: Compliance flags indicating the status of various checks

children.name: amlCheckCompleted
children.description: Indicates whether the anti-money laundering check was completed

children.name: sanctionsCheckCompleted
children.description: Indicates whether the sanctions check was completed

children.name: creditPolicyWaiverRequired
children.description: Indicates whether a credit policy waiver is required

children.name: waiverDocumentReference
children.description: Reference number for the waiver document
